folio.label: 179v
folio.l: And falsly vn to his foomen , she hi~ solde
And slepynge in hire barm , vp oon a day
She made to clippe or shere , his heere a way
And made hise foomen , al this craft espien
And whan æ they hi~ fond , in this array
They bounde hi~ fast , & putten out hise eyen
¢ But or his her was clipped , or I shaue
There was no bond , w whicú me~ mygút hi~ bynde
But now is he in prisou~ , in a caue
Where as they made hi~ , atte querne grynde
O noble Sampsou~ , strengest of mankynde
O whilom Iuge in glorie , and in richesse
Now maistow wepen , w thyne eyen blynde
Sithe æè fro wele , art falle in wrecchednesse
¢ The ende of this caityf , was as I shal seye
His foomen maden a feste , vp on a day
And maden hi~ as here fool , bifore he~ pleye
And this was in a temple , of gret array
But atte laste , he made a foul affray
For he two pilers shoke , & made he~ falle
And doun fel temple & al , and there it lay
And slow hi~ self , & eke his foomen alle
¢ This is to seyn , the Pénces euäychon
And eke thre thousand bodies , were there slayn
W fallyngö of the gret temple , of ston
Of Sampson , now wol I no more sayn
Betú war by this ensample , old and playn
That nomannomennomaen telle here cou~seil , to here wyues
Of swicú thyngö , as they wolde han secree fayn
If æ it touche , here lymes , or here lyues
¢ Of hercules , the Souereigne conquerour
Syngyn hise werkes laude , & heigú renou~
For in his tyme , of strengthe he was the flour
He slow & raft the skyn , fro the leou~
He of Centaures , leide the boost a doun~
He Arpies slow , the cruel briddes felle
He goldene Apples reft , of the dragoun
He drow out Cerberus the hound , of helle
¢ He slow the cruel tyraunt , Busirus
And mad his hors , to frete hi~ flessú & bon
He slow the firy serpent , venimë
Of Achilois hornes two , he brak oon
And he slow Cakus , in a kaue of ston
He slow the Geau~t , Anthoë the stronge
He slow the grisly Boor , and that a noon
